headline: All You Need to Know About Globe Life (GL) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: Globe Life (GL) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

headline: Globe Life: Quality Business, But The Easy Trust Recovery Is Already Priced In
summary: Globe Life demonstrates strong profit growth and robust capital returns, supported by a $610M share buyback for 2026. Read more on GL stock here.
